titles.title: One thing my heart is set upon

authors.author: Matt Redman
Matt Redman
Nur eins, das ist mein Herzenswunsch (Näher zu Dir)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One thing my heart is set upon One thing that I would ask To know You Lord as close as one Could hope to on this Earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Intimacy O Jesus intimacy My treasure will be O Jesus Your intimacy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To look upon Your beauty Lord Your glory and Your heart To know You close and closer still Each day upon this Earth

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord since the day I saw You first My soul was satisfied And yet because I see in part I m searching more to find
